prestazioni: Engine: 2.0L TSI (EA888 Gen 2 - **CCTA/CBFA** code) with **Garrett GT2867R .86 A/R turbocharger** (hybrid core, billet wheel, 360° journal bearing upgrade) paired with **Forge Motorsport Motorsport 3-port diverter valve** and **034 Motorsport billet aluminum intake manifold** (ported for optimized airflow).

Fuel System: **Bosch Motorsport 1000cc high-impedance injectors** (PN: 0 280 158 117) with **AEM 380LPH in-tank fuel pump** and **Radium Engineering dual catch can system** (PCV/CCV separation) to prevent oil dilution in the **IE Stage 2+ ECU flash** (custom dyno-tuned for 320whp/350lb-ft on **93 octane + E30 blend**).

Drivetrain: **South Bend Clutch Stage 3 Daily** (ceramic-metallic disc, 6-puck, 2400lb clamp load) with **02M 6-speed DSG **TCU tune by **GIAC** (aggressive shift logic, launch control, torque limiter removal) and **Peloquin LSD** (1.5-way, 40% lockup under power).
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 Scirocco widebody kit** (carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and duckbill spoiler) with **custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap** (color-matched to **VW Lime Green** accents on side skirts and mirror caps).

**OEM+ Euro-spec Scirocco R front bumper** (with **APR carbon fiber splitter** and **custom 3D-printed air curtain ducts**) paired with **H&R RS Coilovers** (1.8" drop, adjustable damping) and **BBS CH-R 19x9.5 ET35 wheels** (staggered, **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2** 245/35/19 tires).

**Full interior carbon fiber overhaul**: **Recaro Sportster CS seats** (VW Motorsport stitching, **Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses**), **Momo Mod.78 steering wheel** (suede, 350mm, **NRG quick-release hub**), and **custom roll cage** (TIG-welded, **Custom Cages UK** bolt-in design with **Sparco harness bar**).
